section_miscategorizations.text: Rescribe two tablets of Tylenol 500 mg every 4 hours and two tablets of Ibuprofen 200 mg every 4 hours.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The intent appears to be a new or adjusted prescription (which belongs in P), but the wording 'Rescribe' is ambiguous and could be misread as documenting an existing regimen. Content-wise it functions as a plan item, so this is only a minor organizational/wording issue rather than a true section miscategorization.
